search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: What Is Tendinitis? Got knee pain? If you’re an athlete or fitness enthusiast, you may have tendinitis. “Many people who participate in sports or fitness activities will get tendinitis at one time or another,” says Steven Stuchin, MD, director of orthopaedic surgery at NYU Hospital for Joint Diseases in New York City.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses tendinitis and knee pain, not information about starting a YouTube channel.

history.title: What Is Tendinitis?
history.description: Got knee pain? If you’re an athlete or fitness enthusiast, you may have tendinitis. “Many people who participate in sports or fitness activities will get tendinitis at one time or another,” says Steven Stuchin, MD, director of orthopaedic surgery at NYU Hospital for Joint Diseases in New York City.
